listing.title: Studio near UBC, $1650, utilities included
listing.description: Private studio, quiet building, normal lease. Viewing available evenings. No upfront payment before viewing. Application fee: none.

signals.label: Mentions application / processing fee
signals.why_it_matters: Fees can be used to extract money from many applicants. Some jurisdictions restrict these.

signals.label: Photo looks reused from other listings
signals.why_it_matters: Scammers often reuse attractive photos across multiple fake listings.

signals.label: Photo looks reused from other listings
signals.why_it_matters: Scammers often reuse attractive photos across multiple fake listings.

topReasons: Photo looks reused from other listings
Photo looks reused from other listings
recommendedActions: Do not send money or personal documents yet.
Request an in-person viewing (or a verified video tour) and confirm the landlord or agent is authorized.
Search the address and photos online to check if they are reused.
Avoid wire transfers, gift cards, and urgent e-transfer requests. Use traceable payments after a written lease is agreed.
Report the listing on the platform and keep screenshots of messages and payment requests.
